title: Gourmet Grilled Canadian Beef Gratin
description: Fresh, pillowy, festive Canadian dish featuring minced beef, sous-vide, vegan-friendly, vessel=salt-block.
instructions: Sous-vide a 1-pound (450g) portion of minced Canadian beef to 130°F (54°C).
Finely chop the red onion and sauté it in 1 tablespoon of unsalted butter until translucent.
Finely chop the fresh thyme and sage and mix with 2 tablespoons of all-purpose flour.
Add the dry white wine to the onion mixture and stir to combine, cooking for 2 minutes.
Add the beef broth to the wine mixture and stir to combine.
Melt the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter in a separate pan, then add the sous-vide beef and cook for 1 minute on each side, until browned.
Transfer the beef to a 9x13-inch baking dish and top with the onion mixture, thyme-sage mixture, and 1/2 cup of Grana Padano cheese.
Transfer the baking dish to the preheated salt-block and cook for 5 minutes or until the cheese is bubbly and golden brown.
Garnish with 1/4 cup of fresh parsley, and serve with a dollop of sour cream if desired.
Let the dish rest for 2 minutes before serving.
Repeat the process if serving a larger crowd, or make individual servings in ramekins.
